meta.title: Confused elderly patient — appointment confirmation
meta.description: Elderly caller confused about upcoming appointment time — slow pace, gentle clarification.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Cascade Family Dentistry, this is Aly.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hello, my name is Nora Bell. I don't understand what you mean about my appointment letter.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: I'm happy to help clarify. Are you calling to confirm an appointment?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I don't know what to do. I think I have a cleaning tomorrow but I'm not sure.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Let me look that up. Date of birth?
